title: User virtual views, statistics and organization proposals
objective: Implement user virtual structures, safe usage statistics and organization proposals based on stable behavior.
non_goals: Do not expose another user's personal virtual paths.
Do not use raw search queries as shared evidence.
Do not let user virtual views grant access to restricted files.
Do not create organization proposals from a single user's behavior alone.
requirements: User views must be separate from organization views.
Organization proposals must use aggregation thresholds.
Proposal evidence must include adoption, stability, churn, admin overrides and conflicts.
Rejected proposals must be preserved as negative examples.
acceptance_checks: A user can create a virtual placement without moving the physical file.
Access checks still block files the user cannot read.
Stats command creates no proposal below aggregation threshold.
